layout.composer: fixed bottom-center, grows on multiline input
layout.message_style: user = bubble/highlight, AI = full-width flat prose

interactions.copy_button: appears on hover over code/response blocks
interactions.code_blocks: distinct background, language label, copy button

typography_rules: never full-bleed text — always max-width constrained
code always uses monospace in visually distinct blocks

claude.personality: warm, humanist, honest — feels like a thoughtful collaborator

typography.body: Anthropic Sans — clean, readable, never cold

principles: warmth over sterility — cream and terracotta, not clinical white
prose-first layout — information breathes in paragraphs, not dashboards
honest restraint — no flashy animation, trust built through calm
generous whitespace — padding is large, density is avoided
claude.motion: minimal — soft fades, cursor blink only

chatgpt.personality: neutral, functional, professional — productivity and utility first

typography.body: clean, neutral, utilitarian — slightly tight line-height
typography.markdown_usage: heavy — headers, bullets, code blocks aggressively structured

shape.shadows: subtle elevation, no hard drop shadows

principles: dark-first — deep charcoal is the default experience, not an option
function over form — UI chrome disappears, content is the product
markdown density — information structured aggressively for power users
rounded but serious — large radii on components, tone stays professional
chatgpt.motion: smooth and subtle — nothing distracts from the task

gemini.personality: Material You, multimodal, expressive — colorful and deeply branded

typography.display: Google Sans / Product Sans — rounded, optically balanced
typography.body: Google Sans Text — accessible, Material rhythm

principles: Material You dynamics — tonal surfaces, dynamic color, M3 container hierarchy
multimodal-first icons — sparkle/star glyph identity, playful and rounded
brand color expressiveness — 4-color Google spectrum in gradients and states
fluid not rigid — morphing shapes, animated color washes, expressive motion
gemini.motion: spring curves, 300–500ms — most expressive of all AI interfaces

copilot.personality: Fluent Design, enterprise-ready, productivity-embedded — familiarly Microsoft

shape.icons: Fluent Icons — filled and outlined variants

principles: Fluent acrylic and depth — translucency and Reveal highlights create material physicality
Office DNA — design is subordinate to host product (Word, Teams, Edge)
task-oriented flow — action panels, suggested prompts, quick tasks over open chat
animated gradient identity — blue-to-purple swirl is the brand signature
copilot.motion: Fluent easing curves, 200–300ms — precise and efficient
